ports.note: IEC C14 power inlet; internal universal switching PSU, 100-240V AC, 19-25W

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: HDMI 2.0, HDCP 2.2; supports up to 4K/60fps, HDR10, HDR10+, HLG. Dolby Vision is NOT supported.

ports.name: Power
ports.note: Micro USB power input; 5V 1A, ~2.5W typical during 4K streaming. Can be powered from TV USB port or included AC adapter.

ports.name: SDI In
ports.note: Combined/loopthrough with one of the SDI Out connectors. Supports 3G-SDI (SMPTE 424M/425M-AB), HD-SDI (SMPTE 292M), and SD-SDI (SMPTE 259M-C).

ports.name: SDI Out 1
ports.note: One of two SDI outputs; this one is shared/combined with the SDI In connector (loopthrough or re-clocked output).

ports.name: SDI Out 2
ports.note: Dedicated second SDI output. Supports 3G-SDI (SMPTE 424M/425M-AB), HD-SDI (SMPTE 292M), and SD-SDI (SMPTE 259M-C).

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: HDMI Type A (19-pin). Supports HDCP.

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: HDMI Type A (19-pin). Supports HDCP.

ports.name: RGB/Component In
ports.note: HD DB-15 (VGA shell) used for analog RGB or YPbPr component input, not VGA-signal. Signal levels: 1.0Vp-p (Y), 0.7Vp-p (R/G/B/Pb/Pr), 5VTTL (H/V sync). Closest connector in list is 'vga'.

ports.name: Composite In
ports.note: Composite video input. 1.0Vp-p. Supports NTSC and PAL.

ports.name: Ref In
ports.note: Reference/sync input. 75 ohm. Accepts Black Burst, Bi-level, and Tri-level sync.

ports.name: Audio In L/R
ports.note: Analog audio RCA phono pair (L and R), combined/shared with Audio Out. Input level -6 dBV.

ports.name: Audio Out L/R
ports.note: Analog audio RCA phono pair (L and R), combined/shared with Audio In. Max output level +6 dBV.

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Hi-Speed USB Type B. Used for firmware updates and control.

ports.name: DC In
ports.note: 9V DC input from included external AC adapter.

ports.note: 3G-SDI / HD-SDI (SMPTE 424M/425M-AB, 292M)

ports.name: UTX-B40 USB-C (Service only)

ports.name: URX-P40 Headphone Output

ports.name: URX-P40 USB-C Power

ports.name: Ethernet
